tables.description: This subject phenotype data table includes subject sex, race, age, year of enrollment, log2 antibody titers (n=18 variables; Assays: hemagglutination inhibition and neutralization; Antigens: H1N1, H3N2, FluB; Time: preimmune, 14 days, and 28 days).

variables.name: Age
variables.description: Subject age

variables.name: HAI_FluBDay0
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; FluB antigen; preimmune

variables.name: HAI_FluBDay14
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; FluB antigen; 14 days postimmunization

variables.name: HAI_FluBDay28
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; FluB antigen; 28 days postimmunization

variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H1N1 antigen; 14 days postimmunization

variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H1N1 antigen; 28 days postimmunization

variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H3N2 antigen; preimmune

variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H3N2 antigen; 14 days postimmunization

variables.name: HAI_H3N2Day28
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, hemagglutination inhibition assay; H3N2 antigen; 28 days postimmunization

variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, neutralization assay; FluB antigen; preimmune

variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, neutralization assay; H1N1 antigen; preimmune

variables.name: Neut_H1N1Day14
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, neutralization assay; H1N1 antigen; 14 days postimmunization

variables.name: Neut_H1N1Day28
variables.description: Log2 antibody titer, neutralization assay; H1N1 antigen; 28 days postimmunization

tables.description: This sample attributes data table includes body site where sample was collected, analyte type, and genotyping center.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

tables.description: This sample GEO mapping data table includes a mapping of sample IDs to GEO accession IDs, and RNA IDs collected at each study visit.

variables.name: GEO_ACCESSION
variables.description: GEO accession ID

variables.name: RNA_ID_TIMEPOINT
variables.description: RNA samples collected from the corresponding subjects at each study visit

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID
